TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = dxgal Nsgan Bsuring ni Alang = Knsuyang Nsgan Bsuring o ga mniq suyang bi qhuni rnaaw,ga hiya ka suyang bi lnglunganseejiq knsteita, Truku o plealay bi dhuq dxgal nii, niqan seejiq Klmukan ,seejiq Ngayngay ni seejiq Cyukuku uri, mseupu nami mniq dxgal nii o mkmalu nami bi balay kiya o paru bi gnhuway utux ka nii, dxgal nii o suyang bi bgihur na ni brah Nsgan o niqan gsilung paru, dgiyaq paru o mgpajiq kana ka Dgiyaq paru suyang bi qtaan. Dxgal Nsgan Bsuring Dxgal Nsgan Bsuring o gaga mniq tgdaya Nyusan Skangki, kmpraan na o smka Nyusan Skangki ,dxgal Nsgan Bsuring paah tgdaya bitaq tgtruma o dgril bbaraw,mdka smwaqit idas,dxgal na o lala bi dgiyaq ni ini klala ka breenux dxgal. Rahuq na 3% ka dxgal breenux ni 4% dxgal yayung. Kana na do dgiyaq kana ki da. Quri ryaxan hidaw o Dgiyaq Paru, saw bi smiisug.Niqan Dgiyaq Bburaw,Dgiyaq Klbiyun nii o 3000 quri baraw tnegkala dgiyaq paah gsilung,duma na do 1000 bitaq 3000quri baraw thegkalan dgiyaq paah gsilung.Nsgan Bsuring o tgparu bi Nsgan kana klwaanTaywang,tnealang Nsgan Bsuring o alang Truku mkBaraw o 96 alang (patas Nihung1917)ni Truku mkSiyaw o alang. Alang ga Truku mkBaraw o patas pntasan empatas seejiq. Nihung pnegkla patas 1917,sayang ka alang o ungat seejiq gaga mniq alang hiya. Hangan alang (1) Truku mkSiyaw Ś§ĖŚ§™ť≠ĮťĖ£śóŹ Knlibu, Twihing, Twanay, Rusaw, 2Gukul, Qnragan, Skadan, Snlingan, Smuk mkKulu, Tkijig, Dgarung, Huhus, Sdagan, Driq, Tasil, Kulu, Bsngan, Rucing, Btakan, Btulan, Tbquyan, Bruwan, Tgmuan, Bsuring, Dowras, Pratan, Rusaw, Smudal, Tqian rungay, Kraga, 1Gukil, Smdapa, Sbiki, Kdusan, Snpragan, Bnkadu, Driq, Wili, Bngrux, Pajiq, Uyawnowdaw, Btakan, Djima, Qowgan, 3Gukul, Bikaw. (2) alang sayang ÁŹĺŚú®ťÉ®ŤźĹ Kiya ka kiya ni sayang ka alang Truku mkSiyaw o paah truma bi Nsgan Bsuring o, Tmunan, Dumung, Pusu Qsiya, Kdusan, Qowgan, Bsuring, Bsngan, Tkijig, ni Knlibu. (3) Truku mkBaraw ŚÖßŚ§™ť≠ĮťĖ£śóŹ Mhiyang, Ibuh, Tpdu, Dowras, Tbula, Sipaw, Dgiyaq, Slaq, Wahir, Qmuhir, Qrgi, mkRbuq, Skliyan, Skahing, Sumiq, Tpuqu, Branaw, Qlapaw, Kbayan, Rbuq, Btunux, Luung, Buqa Paras,Slagu Qhuni,Tngraw, Rusaw, 1Bnarah, Swasal, Sqrxan, Breenux, Branaw, Lapax, Skuy, Shingan, Mquwis, Qurang, Tasil ,2Bnarah, Pcingan, Bksuy, Raus.... Klgan seejiq ga na mniq hiya o 90%o Truku,rahuq hi ka klgan seejiq14%tuma.Knhbragan Truku o 15000 hiyi. Pnyahan kari Ť≥áśĖôšĺÜśļź: ÁßÄśěóťĄČŚŅó 2006
S.PHON: = dxgal nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč ni alaŇč = knsujaŇč nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč o ga mniq sujaŇč bi qńßuni …ĺnaaw,ga ńßija ka sujaŇč bi lŇčluŇčans…ô…ô…üiq knst…ôita, t…ĺuku o pl…ôalaj bi dńßuq dxgal nii, niqan s…ô…ô…üiq klmukan ,s…ô…ô…üiq ŇčajŇčaj ni s…ô…ô…üiq ¶jukuku u…ĺi, ms…ôupu nami mniq dxgal nii o mkmalu nami bi balaj kija o pa…ĺu bi gnńßuwaj utux ka nii, dxgal nii o sujaŇč bi bgińßu…ĺ na ni b…ĺańß nsgan o niqan gsiluŇč pa…ĺu, dgijaq pa…ĺu o mgpa…üiq kana ka dgijaq pa…ĺu sujaŇč bi qtaan. dxgal nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč dxgal nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč o gaga mniq tgdaja njusan skaŇčki, kmp…ĺaan na o smka njusan skaŇčki ,dxgal nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč paańß tgdaja bitaq tgt…ĺuma o dg…ĺil bba…ĺaw,mdka smwaqit idas,dxgal na o lala bi dgijaq ni ini klala ka b…ĺ…ô…ônux dxgal. …ĺańßuq na *% ka dxgal b…ĺ…ô…ônux ni *% dxgal jajuŇč. kana na do dgijaq kana ki da. qu…ĺi …ĺjaxan ńßidaw o dgijaq pa…ĺu, saw bi smiisug.niqan dgijaq bbu…ĺaw,dgijaq klbijun nii o **** qu…ĺi ba…ĺaw tn…ôgkala dgijaq paańß gsiluŇč,duma na do **** bitaq ****qu…ĺi ba…ĺaw tńß…ôgkalan dgijaq paańß gsiluŇč.nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč o tgpa…ĺu bi nsgan kana klwaantajwaŇč,tn…ôalaŇč nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč o alaŇč t…ĺuku mkba…ĺaw o ** alaŇč (patas nińßuŇč****)ni t…ĺuku mksijaw o alaŇč. alaŇč ga t…ĺuku mkba…ĺaw o patas pntasan …ômpatas s…ô…ô…üiq. nińßuŇč pn…ôgkla patas ****,sajaŇč ka alaŇč o uŇčat s…ô…ô…üiq gaga mniq alaŇč ńßija. ńßaŇčan alaŇč (*) t…ĺuku mksijaw ***** knlibu, twińßiŇč, twanaj, …ĺusaw, *gukul, qn…ĺagan, skadan, snliŇčan, smuk mkkulu, tki…üig, dga…ĺuŇč, ńßuńßus, sdagan, d…ĺiq, tasil, kulu, bsŇčan, …ĺu ¶iŇč, btakan, btulan, tbqujan, b…ĺuwan, tgmuan, bsu…ĺiŇč, dow…ĺas, p…ĺatan, …ĺusaw, smudal, tqian …ĺuŇčaj, k…ĺaga, *gukil, smdapa, sbiki, kdusan, snp…ĺagan, bnkadu, d…ĺiq, wili, bŇč…ĺux, pa…üiq, ujawnowdaw, btakan, d…üima, qowgan, *gukul, bikaw. (*) alaŇč sajaŇč **** kija ka kija ni sajaŇč ka alaŇč t…ĺuku mksijaw o paańß t…ĺuma bi nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč o, tmunan, dumuŇč, pusu qsija, kdusan, qowgan, bsu…ĺiŇč, bsŇčan, tki…üig, ni knlibu. (*) t…ĺuku mkba…ĺaw ***** mńßijaŇč, ibuńß, tpdu, dow…ĺas, tbula, sipaw, dgijaq, slaq, wańßi…ĺ, qmuńßi…ĺ, q…ĺgi, mk…ĺbuq, sklijan, skańßiŇč, sumiq, tpuqu, b…ĺanaw, qlapaw, kbajan, …ĺbuq, btunux, luuŇč, buqa pa…ĺas,slagu qńßuni,tŇč…ĺaw, …ĺusaw, *bna…ĺańß, swasal, sq…ĺxan, b…ĺ…ô…ônux, b…ĺanaw, lapax, skuj, sńßiŇčan, mquwis, qu…ĺaŇč, tasil ,*bna…ĺańß, p ¶iŇčan, bksuj, …ĺaus.... klgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga na mniq ńßija o **%o t…ĺuku,…ĺańßuq ńßi ka klgan s…ô…ô…üiq**%tuma.knńßb…ĺagan t…ĺuku o ***** ńßiji. pnjańßan ka…ĺi ****: **** ****
S.FORM: = dxgal Nsgan Bsuring ni Alang = Knsuyang Nsgan Bsuring o ga mniq suyang bi qhuni rnaaw,ga hiya ka suyang bi lnglunganseejiq knsteita, Truku o plealay bi dhuq dxgal nii, niqan seejiq Klmukan ,seejiq Ngayngay ni seejiq Cyukuku uri, mseupu nami mniq dxgal nii o mkmalu nami bi balay kiya o paru bi gnhuway utux ka nii, dxgal nii o suyang bi bgihur na ni brah Nsgan o niqan gsilung paru, dgiyaq paru o mgpajiq kana ka Dgiyaq paru suyang bi qtaan. Dxgal Nsgan Bsuring Dxgal Nsgan Bsuring o gaga mniq tgdaya Nyusan Skangki, kmpraan na o smka Nyusan Skangki ,dxgal Nsgan Bsuring paah tgdaya bitaq tgtruma o dgril bbaraw,mdka smwaqit idas,dxgal na o lala bi dgiyaq ni ini klala ka breenux dxgal. Rahuq na 3% ka dxgal breenux ni 4% dxgal yayung. Kana na do dgiyaq kana ki da. Quri ryaxan hidaw o Dgiyaq Paru, saw bi smiisug.Niqan Dgiyaq Bburaw,Dgiyaq Klbiyun nii o 3000 quri baraw tnegkala dgiyaq paah gsilung,duma na do 1000 bitaq 3000quri baraw thegkalan dgiyaq paah gsilung.Nsgan Bsuring o tgparu bi Nsgan kana klwaanTaywang,tnealang Nsgan Bsuring o alang Truku mkBaraw o 96 alang (patas Nihung1917)ni Truku mkSiyaw o alang. Alang ga Truku mkBaraw o patas pntasan empatas seejiq. Nihung pnegkla patas 1917,sayang ka alang o ungat seejiq gaga mniq alang hiya. (3) Truku mkBaraw ŚÖßŚ§™ť≠ĮťĖ£śóŹ Mhiyang, Ibuh, Tpdu, Dowras, Tbula, Sipaw, Dgiyaq, Slaq, Wahir, Qmuhir, Qrgi, mkRbuq, Skliyan, Skahing, Sumiq, Tpuqu, Branaw, Qlapaw, Kbayan, Rbuq, Btunux, Luung, Buqa Paras,Slagu Qhuni,Tngraw, Rusaw, 1Bnarah, Swasal, Sqrxan, Breenux, Branaw, Lapax, Skuy, Shingan, Mquwis, Qurang, Tasil ,2Bnarah, Pcingan, Bksuy, Raus.... S.PHON: = dxgal nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč ni alaŇč = knsujaŇč nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč o ga mniq sujaŇč bi qńßuni …ĺnaaw,ga ńßija ka sujaŇč bi lŇčluŇčans…ô…ô…üiq knst…ôita, t…ĺuku o pl…ôalaj bi dńßuq dxgal nii, niqan s…ô…ô…üiq klmukan ,s…ô…ô…üiq ŇčajŇčaj ni s…ô…ô…üiq ¶jukuku u…ĺi, ms…ôupu nami mniq dxgal nii o mkmalu nami bi balaj kija o pa…ĺu bi gnńßuwaj utux ka nii, dxgal nii o sujaŇč bi bgińßu…ĺ na ni b…ĺańß nsgan o niqan gsiluŇč pa…ĺu, dgijaq pa…ĺu o mgpa…üiq kana ka dgijaq pa…ĺu sujaŇč bi qtaan. dxgal nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč dxgal nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč o gaga mniq tgdaja njusan skaŇčki, kmp…ĺaan na o smka njusan skaŇčki ,dxgal nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč paańß tgdaja bitaq tgt…ĺuma o dg…ĺil bba…ĺaw,mdka smwaqit idas,dxgal na o lala bi dgijaq ni ini klala ka b…ĺ…ô…ônux dxgal. …ĺańßuq na *% ka dxgal b…ĺ…ô…ônux ni *% dxgal jajuŇč. kana na do dgijaq kana ki da. qu…ĺi …ĺjaxan ńßidaw o dgijaq pa…ĺu, saw bi smiisug.niqan dgijaq bbu…ĺaw,dgijaq klbijun nii o **** qu…ĺi ba…ĺaw tn…ôgkala dgijaq paańß gsiluŇč,duma na do **** bitaq ****qu…ĺi ba…ĺaw tńß…ôgkalan dgijaq paańß gsiluŇč.nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč o tgpa…ĺu bi nsgan kana klwaantajwaŇč,tn…ôalaŇč nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč o alaŇč t…ĺuku mkba…ĺaw o ** alaŇč (patas nińßuŇč****)ni t…ĺuku mksijaw o alaŇč. alaŇč ga t…ĺuku mkba…ĺaw o patas pntasan …ômpatas s…ô…ô…üiq. nińßuŇč pn…ôgkla patas ****,sajaŇč ka alaŇč o uŇčat s…ô…ô…üiq gaga mniq alaŇč ńßija. ńßaŇčan alaŇč (*) t…ĺuku mksijaw ***** knlibu, twińßiŇč, twanaj, …ĺusaw, *gukul, qn…ĺagan, skadan, snliŇčan, smuk mkkulu, tki…üig, dga…ĺuŇč, ńßuńßus, sdagan, d…ĺiq, tasil, kulu, bsŇčan, …ĺu ¶iŇč, btakan, btulan, tbqujan, b…ĺuwan, tgmuan, bsu…ĺiŇč, dow…ĺas, p…ĺatan, …ĺusaw, smudal, tqian …ĺuŇčaj, k…ĺaga, *gukil, smdapa, sbiki, kdusan, snp…ĺagan, bnkadu, d…ĺiq, wili, bŇč…ĺux, pa…üiq, ujawnowdaw, btakan, d…üima, qowgan, *gukul, bikaw. (*) alaŇč sajaŇč **** kija ka kija ni sajaŇč ka alaŇč t…ĺuku mksijaw o paańß t…ĺuma bi nsgan bsu…ĺiŇč o, tmunan, dumuŇč, pusu qsija, kdusan, qowgan, bsu…ĺiŇč, bsŇčan, tki…üig, ni knlibu. (*) t…ĺuku mkba…ĺaw ***** mńßijaŇč, ibuńß, tpdu, dow…ĺas, tbula, sipaw, dgijaq, slaq, wańßi…ĺ, qmuńßi…ĺ, q…ĺgi, mk…ĺbuq, sklijan, skańßiŇč, sumiq, tpuqu, b…ĺanaw, qlapaw, kbajan, …ĺbuq, btunux, luuŇč, buqa pa…ĺas,slagu qńßuni,tŇč…ĺaw, …ĺusaw, *bna…ĺańß, swasal, sq…ĺxan, b…ĺ…ô…ônux, b…ĺanaw, lapax, skuj, sńßiŇčan, mquwis, qu…ĺaŇč, tasil ,*bna…ĺańß, p ¶iŇčan, bksuj, …ĺaus.... klgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga na mniq ńßija o **%o t…ĺuku,…ĺańßuq ńßi ka klgan s…ô…ô…üiq**%tuma.knńßb…ĺagan t…ĺuku o ***** ńßiji. pnjańßan ka…ĺi ****: **** ****
